title: The Call
tmdbOverview: Connected by phone in the same home but 20 years apart, a caller puts a woman’s past — and life — on the line to change her own fate.
synopsis: The Call is a 2020 thriller, mystery and science fiction film from South Korea. It holds a solid 7.1 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a MA 15+ certification (AU rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
